title: National Airline Safety Scare
description: A series of near-miss incidents raises concerns about airline safety protocols.

A.title: Ground all flights for safety inspections

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Grounding flights ensures safety. Near-misses are warnings we can’t ignore.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Grounding flights punishes travelers and restricts freedom.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: And it devastates the economy. Inspections without grounding are more balanced.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Balance doesn’t matter if a plane goes down.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Self-regulation respects freedom and avoids government overreach.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Self-regulation is what caused the near-misses in the first place.
